body: Tokens imported. I named the palette swatches to match your Figma so it should stay in sync.
Looks great. One thing: the type scale jumps a bit hard from H3 to body. Can we tighten that step?
Hero animation is live on staging. The lettering fades in on scroll, let me know if it feels too slow.
The ampersand crossbar is sitting a hair low against the cap height. Nudging the SVG and re-exporting now.
Swapped in the updated SVG, thanks. Crossbar looks right now.
Filters are wired to the category field. Added wedding, logos, and signage to start.
Confirmed on my iPad Pro, the drawer no longer covers the logo. Nice fix.
Typeform is embedded and UTM params are flowing through. Tested an enquiry end to end.
Mobile Lighthouse is at 94 after the WebP swap. Largest contentful paint dropped by about a second.
Can we use the studio earth-tone hero crop for the default Open Graph image? It reads better than a flat logo.
Gallery is live. Cross-links jump straight to the matching Etsy listing where one exists.
Thumbnails look true to the originals on my calibrated screen. Tweaked two alt strings to read more naturally.
Focus rings are in and heading order is fixed. axe is clean on home and contact now.
Domain is pointed and SSL verified. Redirects from the old one-pager are all returning 301.
I got two identical enquiries from the same client a minute apart, so the double submit is real. Thanks for jumping on it.
Debounce is in on staging and I am adding a honeypot field next. Will move to review once spam settles.
Queuing the portal for Phase 2 in the fall. Retainer clients keep asking for a status view, so this is worth doing right.
Agreed. I will draft the data model for the portal before we start the sprint in October.
